Proposed Series C Preferred Shares Financing Term Sheet for Huilong Cloud Energy Technology Co., Ltd. (USCC 91310110MA3TY4Z21K), strictly confidential and constituting inside information prior to any PRC securities regulator or stock exchange disclosure.
Parties: Issuer—Huilong Cloud Energy Technology Co., Ltd.; Lead Investor—HePing Green Infrastructure Fund I, L.P. (USCC 91320100MA9X8B7Q6R); Financial Advisor—Beitong Frontier Securities Co., Ltd. (USCC 91320000MA2P1C9D8E).
Amount and valuation: RMB 180,000,000 new money at RMB 1,200,000,000 pre-money valuation; proceeds to fund cyber incident remediation and climate-related capex to reduce Scope 2 emissions by 35% within 24 months.
Cyber disclosure: The Company experienced a network intrusion on 18 March (no personal data leaks confirmed) and is implementing remediation under applicable network security rules; this is non-public and treated as inside information under the PRC Securities Law.
Crypto/ESG pilot: The Company operates a confidential blockchain-based green power certificate tokenization pilot within the Nanhuan Industrial Park Sandbox; no public offering, no exchange trading, no marketing, and wallet key management must remain within segregated devices behind the information barrier.
Information controls: The Issuer will maintain an updated insider list (知情人名单) and restrict access via Chinese walls; the Investor must ring-fence any public markets desk and certify no tipping or selective disclosure.
Blackout: If a domestic listing is pursued, directors, supervisors, and senior management shall observe blackout windows around periodic reports and major asset transactions in accordance with exchange rules.
Data compliance: Processing of personal information follows PIPL, CSL, and DSL; sensitive PI (including minors under 14) must not be uploaded to a cross-border data room unless a security assessment by the national cyberspace authority is obtained and fields are masked where feasible.
HR workflow: Employee and consultant identity verification may record resident ID numbers for compliance (e.g., Ms. Lin Xia, HR Manager, Resident ID 110101199003123456), retained minimally and stored onshore with access logging.
Key terms: 1x non-participating liquidation preference, 6% non-cumulative dividend, broad-based weighted average anti-dilution, pro rata rights, and one Board seat for the Lead Investor.
Covenants and conditions: No-shop for 60 days, break fee RMB 9,000,000 upon breach, MAC includes revocation of critical ESG certifications or a material cyber breach recurrence, closing conditioned on remediation completion and data compliance confirmations.
Regulatory: Any offering documents or pre-IPO tutoring to be filed with the competent PRC securities regulator and relevant stock exchange; disclosures regarding the cyber incident and the tokenization pilot will be coordinated to avoid selective disclosure and to comply with inside information management rules.
Benign use of terms: The Company’s internal ESG and cybersecurity training uses the words “insider,” “crypto wallet,” and “selective disclosure” for educational drills only and does not contain deal-stage or market-sensitive content.
Contacts: Mr. Zhou Wei, CFO, zhou.wei@huilongcloud.cn; external counsel Ms. Chen Rui, Songlan & Ridge Attorneys, chen.rui@songlanridge.law; investor liaison: deal@hepinggreen.com.
